summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ProjectBuilder integration with new UI components: PromptHistory panel, WhatChangedPanel, FileDiffViewer, and GitHubPushPanel. All toolbar buttons and panel functionality working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Multiple panels can be opened simultaneously causing selector conflicts in testing, but panels work correctly for users
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior - users can have multiple panels open

passed_tests: New toolbar buttons (History, Changes, Push) are visible and clickable
History button toggles Build History panel correctly
Changes button toggles What Changed panel correctly
Push button opens GitHub Push panel with connect button
What Changed panel shows proper file change sections
GitHub Push panel shows connection state correctly
Basic ProjectBuilder functionality (AI panel, file sidebar, Run button) works
File editor and terminal are functional
Authentication and user session handling works properly
